ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield Final: South Australia vs Victoria (Finished)
AFC U20 Women's Friendly: China PR U20 vs Australia U20 (Finished)

summary: The main event today is the start of the IPL 2026 season with Punjab Kings taking on Gujarat Titans at 19:30 IST (14:00 UTC). The Sheffield Shield 2025-26 Final concluded today with South Australia defeating Victoria to become back-to-back champions.
